narrative:
Licking County has 124,615 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.7 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 27.3% of registrants.
